title: Sockets & Devices
description: Alpha 0.1.0 | Needs an Extra Energy Mod to Work!
body:
**DEPRECATED**

# Sockets Alpha
Needs an Extra Enrgy Mod or use:
```
/data modify block x y z energy set value 2760
```
to Modifiy Energy. **Replace 'x y z' with the actual block coordinates.**

## Adds:
- Sockets
- Connector between Devices and Sockets
- Toasters

**_More will follow, this is Alpha 0.1.0!_**

_No Updates until ???_

**No updates: Forge is slowly dying, which is really sad... I'll be switching to Fabric, but I don't have enough experience with Fabric development yet, and I don't have enough time currently, as I'm working on other projects (Fabric).**
